summary: A clip from a local news segment. It shows the exterior of a three-story brick apartment building behind trees and a white picket fence, then a blonde reporter in a dark blue blazer reporting outdoors near a fence, with another woman standing behind her. The lower-third reads ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CHARGED IN DEADLY STABBING, BAILEY'S CROSSROADS, VA.
